missing_main_functions: Account Recovery / Re-registration after expired verification link
User session management after verification (e.g., auto-login or redirect)
missing_sub_functions: Handling of verification link reuse (e.g., multiple clicks on same link)
Password validation for email prefix case sensitivity (open question not resolved in test structure)
Error handling for email sending service unavailability (e.g., timeout, retry logic)
Verification link token expiration check during login attempt (if user tries to login with expired link)
duplicate_functions: SUB007 (Verification Link Token Validation) and CAT017 (Invalid Token Rejection) overlap with CAT013 (Token Validity and Integrity) - consider merging or clarifying scope
unclear_categories: CAT022 (Disallowed Special Characters Rejection) - unclear whether system should reject or allow with warning; requirement only specifies allowed set
CAT023 and CAT024 (Case-Sensitive vs Case-Insensitive Prefix Comparison) - both are included but only one should be active based on final decision; currently ambiguous
recommendations: Add a main function for handling expired verification links and account recovery flow.
Merge CAT013 and CAT017 into a single category for token validation to avoid duplication.
Clarify the expected behavior for disallowed special characters in passwords (reject or warn).
Resolve the open question on email prefix case sensitivity and keep only the relevant test category.
Add sub-function for verification link reuse detection (e.g., token already used).
Include negative test scenarios for email sending service failure (e.g., mock service down).
Consider adding a sub-function for password validation against email prefix with different case variations to cover the open question.
